description: Report to Al-Afḍal ibn Badr al-Jamālī for the attention of the amir Ḥusām al-Dawla regarding a quantity of produce that had been left unattended. The petitioner asks for new watchmen to be provided. Dating: early 12th century. Verso appears to contain part-drafts of the document on recto, as well as an additional line of text. (Marina Rustow)
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
